MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Annie Shynebauh, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Diamond View Apts.
Charles Tillman Ramsey, counsel for plaintiff

Leticia Rivera, defendant
Chris Sullivan, defendant
Esq. by limited scope representation for defendants

Settlement conference held. Parties entered into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 211 Addison Street, San Francisco, CA.

Trial date vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Barbara M. Anscher, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
